title: Superintendent
notes: Very small K-8 district, Salem County (single school). No dedicated ECE/C&I director; superintendent owns curriculum decisions.

title: Superintendent / Chief School Administrator
notes: Avalon and Stone Harbor consolidated PreK-8 district (Cape May). Single superintendent for both districts. PreK on Avalon campus. Small district; superintendent owns curriculum.

title: Director of Special Services
notes: Jointure commission operating The Shore Center for Students with Autism (ages 3-21). SpEd-only - lower ECE priority. Out-of-district placement program.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum & Instruction
notes: Bergen County PreK-12 district. Has integrated preschool classes at Franklin, Hoover, Lincoln; also partners with Bergenfield Head Start. ECAC active. Asst Supt C&I owns curriculum; preschool program contact William Fleming (wfleming@bergenfield.org).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small PreK-6 district (Warren County, single school). Superintendent owns curriculum decisions; no dedicated ECE/C&I director.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Large PreK-12 district, Ocean County. Has Herbertsville and Warren H. Wolf preschool/ECDC centers - active ECE programs. Susan McNamara (former Dir of Curriculum) retired ~July 2025; current dedicated C&I director not surfaced in public sources. Stephanie Schade listed as Herbertsville Preschool contact (732-785-3000 x1536). Email pattern is firstinitiallastname@brickschools.org. Check Apollo for current Asst Supt C&I.

district: Burlington County Special Services School District
title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum & Instruction
notes: County Special Services district (SpEd-only). Lower ECE priority. Superintendent: Dr. Ashanti N. Holley. Email needed - check Apollo. Email pattern likely jmungo@bcsssd.k12.nj.us.

title: Director of Early Childhood
notes: Former Abbott / state-operated district with universal PreK 3 & 4. Strong ECE target - has dedicated Early Childhood Development Center. Supervisor Early Childhood: Nichole Desesso (ndesesso@camden.k12.nj.us).

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Former Abbott / PEA district, Middlesex County. PreK-12 with strong early childhood presence. Director of C&I owns curriculum. Email pattern: firstinitiallastname@carteretschools.org - likely jwilson@carteretschools.org. Email needed - check Apollo.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: K-12 district (Union County). Grande previously held Director of C&I role before becoming Superintendent. Small admin team - superintendent owns curriculum. PreK enrollment limited.

title: Director of Curriculum, Learning, and Grants
notes: PreK-8 district, Hunterdon County. Superintendent: Dr. Melissa Stager. Director Blanchard joined Feb 2023. Email pattern firstinitiallastname@ctsdnj.org likely - check Apollo.

title: Superintendent
notes: Very small K-8 district (single school, ~154 students), Monmouth County. Superintendent owns curriculum. General district email: info@dealschool.org. Check Apollo for superintendent direct email.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: 7-12 Regional district (Gloucester County) - NO PreK. Lower ECE priority. Asst Supt oversees curriculum. Email needed - check Apollo.

title: Superintendent / Principal
notes: Very small K-8 district (Cumberland County, single school). Combined Superintendent/Principal role. Owns all curriculum decisions.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Large PreK-12 district, Middlesex County. Mamman appointed superintendent Dec 2025; previously Asst Supt for C&I at South Brunswick. Has Early Learning Academy Preschool (community programs) using Creative Curriculum - strong ECE buying signal. Community Programs general email: commprog@ebnet.org. Check Apollo for current Asst Supt of Academics email.

district: Educational Services Commission of New Jersey
title: Schools Superintendent
notes: Educational Services Commission - serves multiple districts (not a traditional K-12 district). ECE priority is lower since they don't directly operate PreK; however, they support member districts. Mark Finkelstein stepped down 2023; Nadia Romano now superintendent. Check Apollo for email.

title: Interim Superintendent
notes: Very small K-8 district, Atlantic County (single school). Interim superintendent role. David Ricci listed as Principal. Owns curriculum decisions.

title: Superintendent
notes: PreK-8 district (~507 students), Sussex County. Principal: Lisa Vallacchi, Ed.D. Small admin - superintendent owns curriculum. Email needed - check Apollo.

title: Chief School Administrator
notes: Very small PreK-8 district (~108 students), Hunterdon County. Edith Ort Thomas Elementary - single school. CSA model. Shares services with Holland Township. Check Apollo for email.

title: Director of Early Childhood Center
notes: Former Abbott district, Camden County. Strong ECE target with dedicated Early Childhood Center. Director of Curriculum: Dr. Kimberley Chiodi. Shane McNichol also listed as Director of Early Childhood in directory.

title: Superintendent
notes: Greenwich-Stow Creek Partnership Schools (Cumberland County). PreK-8. Morris Goodwin School (PreK-4 in Greenwich) + Stow Creek School (5-8). Small district - superintendent owns curriculum. Email pattern: firstinitiallastname@stowcreekschool.com or similar. Check Apollo.

district: Hanover Park Regional High School District
title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction, and Assessment
notes: 9-12 Regional HS district (Morris County) - NO PreK. Lower ECE priority. Superintendent: Maria Carrell. Serves East Hanover, Florham Park, Hanover Township.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Large PreK-12 district, Somerset County. District does not publicly post staff emails to deter spam. Asst Supt oversees C&I. Email pattern: contact district to obtain direct email. Check Apollo.

title: Director of School Services / THRIVE Coordinator
notes: Educational Services Commission (not a traditional K-12 district). ECE priority lower since ESC doesn't directly operate PreK. Operates ESC Academy / Hoffmans Crossing Campus for SpEd. Superintendent name not confirmed in public results.

district: KIPP: Cooper Norcross A New Jersey Nonprofit Corporation
title: Charter Network Leadership
notes: KIPP Cooper Norcross Academy - Renaissance charter network in Camden, K-12, ~2,100 students. Network HQ via KIPP NJ. Specific ECE/C&I leadership for Cooper Norcross not surfaced in public sources. Joanna Belcher mentioned as school leader. Check Apollo for academic leader / dean of curriculum.

notes: Former Abbott / PEA district, Camden County. Has dedicated Lindenwold Early Childhood Center. Uses HighScope curriculum for PreK - strong ECE buying signal. Email pattern firstinitiallastname@lindenwold.k12.nj.us - check Apollo.
